description.ko: 네온 불빛과 폭우가 도시의 디지털 영혼을 정의하는 미래지향적 도시 심연에 대한 낭만적인 시선입니다.
description.en: A romanticized look at a futuristic urban abyss, where neon light and heavy rain define the digital soul of the city.

prompt: A cinematic vertical shot of a rain-drenched cyberpunk megacity canyon in NEON-V. Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are draped in massive 3D holographic advertisements pulsing in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy artificial monsoon rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on the wet asphalt streets below. Flying maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through the thick volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution, capturing a moody and romantic futuristic urban atmosphere.
